data.title: Miss Universe partners with Zetrix for blockchain voting app, empowering millions with secure voting.
data.description: In a significant move, the Miss Universe Organization (MUO) has teamed up with Zetrix AI Berhad to leverage the advanced capabilities of Zetrix, a Layer-1 public blockchain. This collaboration, unveiled in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia on Sept. 25, 2025, aims to empower a vast global audience of millions of fans through secure voting mechanisms and immersive AI companions. The partnership is set to revolutionize the beauty pageant industry by incorporating cutting-edge technology to enhance user engagement.

data.title: CSL Vifor and Travere Therapeutics endorse new guidelines for IgA Nephropathy treatment. Sparsentan suggested for patients at risk.
data.description: In a recent announcement made in St. Gallen, Switzerland, and San Diego, it was mentioned that FILSPARI® (sparsentan) could be a feasible option for individuals suffering from IgA Nephropathy and facing the threat of declining kidney function. The collaboration between CSL Vifor and Travere Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TVTX) underlines their endorsement of the latest findings regarding this potential treatment. The disclosure was made on September 26, 2025, highlighting the joint efforts to address the needs of patients dealing with IgA Nephropathy, a condition that affects a significant number of individuals globally.

data.title: Chinese opera's rich heritage highlighted at ninth Opera Culture Week, showcasing diverse elements like literature, music, dance, martial arts.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, it was reported that Chinese opera holds significant importance in China's rich tapestry of art and culture, encompassing various elements like literature, music, dance, and martial arts. The upcoming ninth Chinese Opera Culture Week is set to showcase the depth and diversity of this traditional art form. This event will serve as a platform for celebrating the history and heritage of Chinese opera, highlighting its enduring legacy. The week-long festivities will feature performances and activities aimed at promoting cultural appreciation and understanding.

INDONESIA MINING MINISTER: GOVERNMENT HAS AGREED WITH FREEPORT TO STOP ALL MINING TO FOCUSv ON SEARCH OF TRAPPED MINERS. PRODUCTION AT FREEPORT HAS NOT RESUMED, STOPPAGE AFFECTS OUTPUT AND REVENUE.

data.title: Statkraft and Eviny sell their shares in Himal Power Ltd to Butwal Power Company, allowing BPC to own 100% of the company.Key numbers: Statkraft - 57% share, Eviny - 26% share, BPC to own 100% of HPL, 60 MW Khimti I Hydropower Plant.
data.description: Statkraft and Eviny have agreed to sell their 57 and 26 percent shares in Himal Power Limited (HPL) to Nepalese local partner Butwal Power Company (BPC), making BPC the sole owner of HPL. The HPL owns the 60 MW Khimti I Hydropower Plant in Nepal, which began operations in 2000. This move aligns with Statkraft's strategy of exiting South Asia to focus on European and South American markets. The Khimti plant has contributed significantly to Nepal's energy system over 25 years, producing over 9,000 GWh of energy with a strong operational track record. BPC plans to continue operating the plant with existing employees. For more details, contact Marte Lerberg Kopstad at Statkraft AS on +47 995 22 026 or martelerberg.kopstad@statkraft.com.

data.title: ETH co-founder transfers $6M, whales buy $1.6B. Jeffrey Wilcke retains hundreds of millions in Ether.
data.description: Jeffrey Wilcke, one of the co-founders of Ethereum and founder of Grid Games, reportedly maintains holdings of Ether totaling hundreds of millions across several wallets.

data.title: Solana price drops below $200 to $192 on Thurs. Upcoming ETF decision could spark institutional interest and push SOL to new highs.
data.description: On Thursday, the price of SOL dropped to $192 before an anticipated ETF ruling that could potentially ignite institutional interest and revive Solana's price trajectory.

data.title: STL partners with Netomnia to enhance UK's full-fibre rollout with end-to-end FTTH solutions, aiming to lower costs.
data.description: STL, a prominent optical and digital solutions company, has broadened its range of fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) solutions to facilitate quicker deployment and reduce overall expenses. The company offers comprehensive solutions starting from cutting-edge optical fiber cables to high-speed connectivity, aiming to enhance the efficiency of FTTH networks. This major development was announced in Mumbai, India and London on September 26, 2025. STL is listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) under the ticker symbol STLTECH.

data.title: RBI approves biometric tech for digital payments, effective April 2026, including IDEX's fingerprint payment solutions.
data.description: In April 2026, the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has given the green light to biometric authentication technology for digital payment transactions. This includes approval for IDEX's fingerprint payment solutions to be used as part of new authentication mechanisms.

data.title: Enhance model training with CUDA-X and GPU acceleration for improved performance and efficiency in manufacturing data science.
data.description: Learn how utilizing CUDA-X Data Science accelerates model training through GPU-optimized libraries, significantly boosting performance and efficiency in manufacturing data science applications. This advanced technology allows for the enhancement of processing speeds by utilizing the power of GPUs, leading to a notable improvement in overall results. Experience substantial benefits, such as a reduction in training time by up to 50% and an increase in efficiency by leveraging the CUDA-X Data Science platform. Sharpen your data science capabilities in manufacturing with this innovative solution.
